title: 115 Mathematics Fig. 4
subject: Mathematics
objective: To draw a perpendicular to a line from a point not on it, by paper folding
procedure:
1.   Fold the paper and get a line AB through folding.   Mark a point C on
the paper such that C is not on AB as shown in Fig. 1.
Fig. 1
2.   Through C, fold the paper such that A falls on B along AB.
Fig. 2   Fig. 3

discussion:
This activity may be used to explain different types of quadrilaterals and
their properties.
